prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `762cd429`.
codex_response:
Implemented `762cd429` end to end. The rule is: take the lone left-edge `2x2` seed and paint center-aligned upscaled copies of it with factors `1, 2, 4, 8, ...`, laid side by side to the right until the canvas width is exhausted; untouched cells remain `0`.

I used the Opus hint as the starting hypothesis and discarded the Sonnet hint because its “diagonal rays / quadrant filling” description is materially wrong for this puzzle; that correction is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_762cd429/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed.
